# Growl Audio

Growl Audio makes precision audio plugins for music producers and engineers.

## gFractor

gFractor is a free spectrum analyzer audio plugin developed by Growl Audio.

- Type: Audio plugin (spectrum analyzer)
- Formats: VST3, AU (macOS); Windows coming soon
- Price: Free. No demo mode, no watermarks, no trial limits.
- Version: 1.0.0
- Download: https://growl-audio.com

### Features
- Mid/Side (M/S) analysis
- Left/Right (L/R) analysis
- Transient/Tone separation analysis
- Sidechain signal comparison with one-key swap
- Goniometer for stereo phase and imaging
- Correlation meter for mono compatibility
- Stereo width visualization per octave
- FFT with adjustable slope, decay, and overlap

### Compatibility
- macOS: VST3, AU
- Windows: coming soon
- DAW formats: VST3, AU
